scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/plugin build && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin build && bun run --cwd packages/oh-my-pi-plugin build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/oh-my-pi-plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/oh-my-pi-plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/plugin lint && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin lint && bun run --cwd packages/oh-my-pi-plugin lint && bun run --cwd packages/cli lint
scripts.lint:fix: bun run --cwd packages/plugin lint:fix && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin lint:fix && bun run --cwd packages/oh-my-pi-plugin lint:fix
